guide.avoidminer.page_1:
AVOID MINER GUIDE

Welcome to the Avoid Miner mod.

This guide covers machines, improvements, recipes, and mechanics.

Contents:
1) Overview
2) Energy and slots
3) World modes
4) Enchant modes
5) Upgrade drops
6) Recipes
guide.avoidminer.page_2:
OVERVIEW

Avoid Miners are automatic machines that burn fuel, store energy, and generate resources.

Features:
- Three machine tiers
- 27 output slots
- Mining, Energy, and Speed improvements
- Six world modes
- Hopper support
guide.avoidminer.page_3:
ENERGY AND FULL OUTPUT

Fuel becomes internal energy.
The machine consumes energy while generating.

If all 27 output slots contain at least one item, the machine pauses and shows FULL. It resumesafter at least one output slot is emptied.
guide.avoidminer.page_4:
WORLD MODES

Overworld: normal mining resources.
Botany: logs, saplings and plants.
Nether: quartz, gold nuggets and ancient debris.
End: End resources and chorus items.
Deep Dark: sculk and Ancient City loot.
Ocean: prismarine, coral and ocean structure loot.
guide.avoidminer.page_5:
ENCHANT MODES

Fortune: multiplies Overworld and Nether outputs from x1 to x4, except ancient debris.

Silk Touch: converts mining outputs into ore blocks. Botany outputs are not changed.
guide.avoidminer.page_6:
UPGRADE DROPS

Upgrade T2:
Generatedby Avoid Miner T1 in Nether mode. Chance: 0.5%.

Upgrade T3:
Generatedby Avoid Miner T2 with Nether + Fortune modifiers at the same time. Chance: 0.5%.
guide.avoidminer.page_7:
IMPROVEMENTS

Mining Upgrade: increases success chance.
T1 x1.5 | T2 x1.7 | T3 x2.0

Energy Upgrade: reduces energy use.
T1 x0.8 | T2 x0.7 | T3 x0.6

Speed Upgrade: reduces cycle time.
T1 /1.5 | T2 /1.7 | T3 /2.0
guide.avoidminer.page_8:
TIPS

- Use hoppers for fuel input and item output.
- Speed + Mining increases production strongly.
- Fortune does not affect ancient debris.
- Silk Touch is theway to get ore blocks from generated resources.
- Empty one output slot to restart a full machine.
